form.formComment: Latest effort finished last over 390m at Ballarat beaten 11 lengths (22.97) behind Paw Renalla in a Grade 5 on March 30. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished last over 390m at Ballarat beaten 11 lengths (22.97) behind Paw Renalla in a Grade 5 on March 30. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 6th in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on March 28 over 400m at this track behind Inga Amy beaten 3.5 lengths (23.11). Placed two back at this track. Should be right in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 6th in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on March 28 over 400m at this track behind Inga Amy beaten 3.5 lengths (23.11). Placed two back at this track. Should be right in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Collided turning off back straight, checked and lost ground.

form.formComment: At the last outing finished last over 300m at Healesville beaten 9 lengths (17.47) behind Daintree Dazzler in a Grade 5 on March 6. Can bounce back. One of the main chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: At the last outing finished last over 300m at Healesville beaten 9 lengths (17.47) behind Daintree Dazzler in a Grade 5 on March 6. Can bounce back. One of the main chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and lost ground turning off back straight.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, Last start finished sixth over 390m at Warrnambool, beaten 10 lengths. Prefer to watch at this stage.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, Last start finished sixth over 390m at Warrnambool, beaten 10 lengths. Prefer to watch at this stage.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest at double figure odds when third (22.43) over 390m at Ballarat. Squeeze draw to overcome. Others preferred.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest at double figure odds when third (22.43) over 390m at Ballarat. Squeeze draw to overcome. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.30) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 7 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and three places from eight starts. Makes appeal on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (23.30) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 7 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and three places from eight starts. Makes appeal on best.

form.formComment: Could only manage sixth last time but the start prior went down fighting at double figure odds when second (22.75) over 390m at Shepparton. Tough draw to overcome but can measure up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage sixth last time but the start prior went down fighting at double figure odds when second (22.75) over 390m at Shepparton. Tough draw to overcome but can measure up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Faltered approaching first turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 0.6 lengths over 390m at Ballarat in a handy 22.44, beating Argyle Emma. Expected to measure up again.
